title: RMiT Cloud Requirements to CSA CCM v4 Mapping
description: Maps BNM RMiT cloud-specific requirements to CSA CCM v4 control domains, showing how CCM compliance supports RMiT obligations

mappings.description: Comprehensive risk assessment before cloud adoption covering 10 specific risk areas

ccmDomains.alignment: GRC risk management programme covers the overarching risk assessment methodology
Data security and privacy controls address data location and co-mingling risks
Infrastructure controls address multi-tenancy isolation
Supply chain controls address vendor lock-in, portability, and CSP termination
Threat and vulnerability management addresses CSP attack exposure

mappings.description: 8 control domains specified in Appendix 10 for public cloud critical systems

ccmDomains.alignment: Governance and oversight requirements
Data security including encryption and classification
Encryption and key management (CMEK requirement)
Identity and access management including MFA and least privilege
Network security including segmentation and WAF
Security monitoring and log management
Incident management including 24h BNM notification
Business continuity and disaster recovery
Vendor management and exit strategy
Audit and assurance including penetration testing

mappings.description: Critical customer data and backups must reside in Malaysia

ccmDomains.alignment: Data security lifecycle including geographic restriction and data transfer controls
Regulatory compliance monitoring

mappings.description: BNM consultation before first public cloud adoption for critical systems — requires risk assessment, CISO confirmation, third-party review

ccmDomains.alignment: Governance programme and risk management
Third-party pre-implementation review requirement
Supply chain due diligence for CSP

mappings.description: Notification for subsequent cloud adoptions — requires enhanced risk framework, independent assurance, adequate IR

ccmDomains.alignment: Enhanced risk management and compliance
Incident response adequacy confirmation
Independent assurance on cloud risk framework

mappings.description: Annual cloud roadmap included in outsourcing plan to BNM

ccmDomains.alignment: Governance programme including strategic planning and regulatory engagement

complianceApproach.title: Using CCM v4 to Satisfy RMiT Cloud Requirements
steps: Map RMiT Appendix 10 domains to corresponding CCM control domains using this cross-reference
Implement CCM controls at the required maturity level — RMiT expects documented, implemented, and independently assured controls
Use CIS Benchmarks (AWS/Azure/GCP) to provide technical evidence for CCM control implementation
Document the shared responsibility model clearly, mapping each RMiT requirement to either institution or CSP responsibility
Conduct annual reassessment of the mapping as both RMiT and CCM evolve
Maintain deviation justification records where CCM controls differ from Appendix 10 measures
